corrected_fields.summary: The Federal Reserve Bank of New York released a special issue of the Economic Policy Review featuring three research papers on New York City's post-pandemic recovery, covering remote work trends, office-to-housing conversions, and racial equity planning. This source concerns urban economics and housing policy rather than financial market structure or macro catalysts.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source does not address financial market structure (trading operations, market microstructure) or macro catalysts (monetary policy decisions, rate changes, economic data releases). It discusses urban planning research papers on NYC's economic recovery.
